{{Quote|Hah-ha! A Jedi? One measly Jedi?! What do you think you can do against an army?|Cyborg Separatist commander|<ref name="A Stranger in Town">{{CWACite|3|A Stranger in Town}}</ref>}}
This '''unidentified separatist commander''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Cyborg/Legends|cyborg]] in charge of the [[Separatist Droid Army/Legends|Separatist Droid Army]] on an [[Unidentified planet (Yoda's chaingun)|unidentified planet]] during the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]].

Following the outbreak of the Clone Wars, the [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|CIS]] droid army, under the command of the cyborg commander, invaded the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] and began to steal land and enslave citizens. Approximately [[22 BBY/Legends|six months after]] the [[First Battle of Geonosis/Legends|First Battle of Geonosis]], the commander attempted to invade a city using an army of [[B1-series battle droid/Legends|B1-series battle droid]]s, [[B2-series super battle droid/Legends|B2 super battle droids]], and [[DSD1 dwarf spider droid/Legends|DSD1 dwarf spider droids]]. The commander led the [[Battle of unidentified planet (Yoda's chaingun)|assault on the city]] from his personal [[Unidentified single-man gun platform|gun platform]], but [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] [[Yoda/Legends|Yoda]] arrived and quickly defeated the army and cyborg commander, scaring him into fleeing from the scene.
